name: Jester
effectText: +4 Mult

name: Greedy Jester
effectText: Played Diamonds give +3 Mult

name: Lusty Jester
effectText: Played Hearts give +3 Mult

name: Wrathful Jester
effectText: Played Spades give +3 Mult

name: Gluttonous Jester
effectText: Played Clubs give +3 Mult

name: Jolly Jester
effectText: Played hand containing a Pair gives +8 Mult

name: Zany Jester
effectText: Played hand containing a Three of a Kind gives +12 Mult
notes: The fandom page explicitly states this includes hands containing any three cards with the same rank, such as Full House.

source.sourceNotes: Verified against Zany Jester fandom page.

name: Mad Jester
effectText: Played hand containing Two Pair gives +10 Mult

name: Crazy Jester
effectText: Played hand containing a Straight gives +12 Mult

name: Droll Jester
effectText: Played hand containing a Flush gives +10 Mult

name: Sly Jester
effectText: Played hand containing a Pair gives +50 Chips

name: Wily Jester
effectText: Played hand containing a Three of a Kind gives +100 Chips

name: Clever Jester
effectText: Played hand containing Two Pair gives +80 Chips

name: Devious Jester
effectText: Played hand containing a Straight gives +100 Chips

name: Crafty Jester
effectText: Played hand containing a Flush gives +80 Chips

name: Half Jester
effectText: +20 Mult if played hand contains 3 or fewer cards

name: Jester Stencil
effectText: X1 Mult for each empty Jester slot

name: Four Fingers
effectText: All Straights and Flushes can be made with 4 cards

name: Mime
effectText: Retrigger all held in hand abilities

name: Hack
effectText: Retrigger all played cards

name: Misprint
effectText: Random Mult between 0 and 23

name: Credit Card
effectText: Go up to -$20 in debt
notes: Economy jester. Can be bought and later sold for the same price.

source.sourceNotes: Credit Card page shows Common, $1, passive, go up to -$20 in debt.

name: Abstract Jester
effectText: +3 Mult for each Jester card (Currently +0 Mult)
notes: Includes itself, so it gives at least +3 Mult.

source.sourceNotes: Abstract Jester page lists Common, $4, +3 Mult for each Jester card.

name: Green Jester
effectText: +1 Mult per hand played, -1 Mult per discard (Currently +0 Mult)
notes: Mixed activation; scales upward with hands and downward with discards.

source.sourceNotes: Green Jester page lists Common, $4, +1 Mult per hand played and -1 per discard.

name: Blue Jester
effectText: +2 Chips for each card remaining in deck
notes: Value decreases as the round continues and cards leave the deck into hand/play/discard.

source.sourceNotes: Blue Jester page lists Common, $5, +2 Chips per card still in deck.

name: Scary Face
effectText: Played face cards give +30 Chips when scored
notes: Face cards are Jack, Queen, and King. In tile mapping this means 11, 12, 13.

source.sourceNotes: Scary Face page lists Common, $4, +30 Chips on scored face cards.

name: Smiley Face
effectText: Played face cards give +5 Mult when scored
notes: Face cards are Jack, Queen, and King. In tile mapping this means 11, 12, 13.

source.sourceNotes: Smiley Face page lists Common, $4, +5 Mult on scored face cards.

name: Faceless Jester
effectText: Earn $5 if 3 or more face cards are discarded at the same time
notes: Debuffed face cards do not count. Face cards map to 11, 12, 13.

source.sourceNotes: Faceless Jester page lists Common, $4, earn $5 if 3 or more face cards are discarded at the same time.

name: Egg
effectText: Earn $3 at end of round

name: Business Card
effectText: Played face cards have a 50% chance to give $2

name: Bonus Jester
effectText: +10 Chips

name: Popcorn
effectText: +20 Mult, loses 4 Mult per round

name: Shoot the Moon
effectText: Each Queen held in hand gives +13 Mult

name: Ice Cream
effectText: +100 Chips, loses 5 Chips for every hand played
notes: Decay chip jester. Starts strong and shrinks as hands are used.

name: Splash
effectText: Every played card counts in scoring
notes: Rule modifier that expands scoring cards beyond standard hand rules.

name: 8 Ball
effectText: Each played 8 has a chance to generate a Tarot card

name: Delayed Gratification
effectText: Earn $2 per discard unused at end of round

name: Raised Fist
effectText: Adds the rank of the lowest card held in hand to Mult
notes: Uses lowest rank in hand for scaling

name: Square Jester
effectText: Gains +4 Chips if played hand has exactly 4 cards

name: Photograph
effectText: First scored face card gives X2 Mult

name: Walkie Talkie
effectText: Each played 10 or 4 gives +4 Mult

name: Golden Jester
effectText: Earn $4 at end of each blind
notes: Baseline economy jester. Fandom page shows sell value $3, implying buy price $6.

source.sourceNotes: Golden Jester page confirms extra $4 at end of each blind; search snippet shows buy price $6 and sell price $3.

name: Juggler
effectText: +1 hand size

source.sourceNotes: Juggler page confirms Common, $4, +1 hand size.

name: Drunkard
effectText: +1 discard each round

source.sourceNotes: Drunkard page confirms Common, $4, +1 discard each round.

name: Mystic Summit
effectText: +15 Mult when 0 discards remaining
unlockCondition: Beat a blind after using all discards

source.sourceNotes: Jesters list and Mult page confirm Common, $5, +15 Mult when 0 discards remaining.

name: Red Card
effectText: This Jester gains +3 Mult when any Booster Pack is skipped (Currently +0 Mult)
notes: Booster-linked scaling mult jester. Preserve source behavior even if Booster Packs are currently disabled.

source.sourceNotes: Red Card page confirms Common, $5, +3 Mult per skipped Booster Pack, starts at +0 Mult. Cannot receive Perishable sticker.

name: Mail-In Rebate
effectText: Earn $5 for each card discarded of the specified rank
notes: Target rank changes every round, choosing from a random rank in deck, weighted by frequency.

source.sourceNotes: Mail-In Rebate page confirms Common, $4, earn $5 for each discarded card of a changing target rank.

name: To Do List
effectText: Earn $4 if poker hand is a [Poker Hand], poker hand changes at end of round

source.sourceNotes: To Do List page confirms Common, $4, earn $4 when played hand matches the current target hand, which changes at end of round.

name: Reserved Parking
effectText: Each held face card gives $1 at end of round
notes: Economy scaling with held face cards.

name: Trading Card
effectText: If first discard of round has exactly 1 card, destroy it and gain $3

name: Even Steven
effectText: Played cards with even rank give +4 Mult when scored
notes: Even ranks in Balatro are 2, 4, 6, 8, and 10.

source.sourceNotes: Even Steven page and Jesters list confirm Common, $4, +4 Mult on scored even ranks (2,4,6,8,10).

name: Odd Todd
effectText: Played cards with odd rank give +31 Chips when scored
notes: Odd ranks in Balatro are A, 3, 5, 7, and 9.

source.sourceNotes: Jesters list and Chips page confirm Common, $4, +31 Chips on scored odd ranks (A,3,5,7,9).

name: Scholar
effectText: Played Aces give +20 Chips and +4 Mult when scored
notes: Ace-specific dual bonus jester. In tile mapping, Ace = 1.

source.sourceNotes: Scholar page and Chips page confirm Common, $4, +20 Chips and +4 Mult for each scored Ace.

name: Fortune Teller
effectText: +1 Mult per Tarot card used this run (Currently +0)
notes: Retroactive scaling. Preserve source behavior even if Tarot cards are currently disabled in project runtime.

source.sourceNotes: Fortune Teller page confirms Common, $6, +1 Mult per Tarot card used this run, retroactive.

name: Fibonacci
effectText: Each played Ace, 2, 3, 5, or 8 gives +8 Mult when scored

name: Banner
effectText: +30 Chips for each remaining discard

name: Gros Michel
effectText: +15 Mult
notes: Unconditional additive mult banana jester. Destruction/chance behavior should be added from the full card page in a later verification pass.

source.sourceNotes: Fandom page confirms Common additive mult jester with unconditional +15 Mult; cost to verify in later pass.

name: Supernova
effectText: Adds the number of times poker hand has been played this run to Mult
notes: Retroactive scaling additive mult jester based on the current scoring hand type.

source.sourceNotes: Jesters list and Supernova page indicate Common, $5, adds times current poker hand has been played this run to Mult.

name: Ride the Bus
effectText: This Jester gains +1 Mult per consecutive hand played without a scoring face card (Currently +0 Mult)
notes: Resets when a scoring face card is included. Face cards map to 11, 12, 13.

source.sourceNotes: Mult page and Ride the Bus page indicate Common, $6, +1 Mult per consecutive hand without a scoring face card.

name: Constellation
effectText: This Jester gains X0.1 Mult per Planet card used (Currently X1 Mult)
notes: Depends on Planet usage. Keep source data intact even if Planets are currently disabled in project runtime.

name: Hanging Chad
effectText: Retrigger first played card used in scoring
